tagline: Curious enough to question, ambitious enough to build.
description: A final-year B.Tech student and aspiring software engineer, building backend systems and AI/ML applications with a focus on retrieval-augmented generation and scalable services.

roles.detailed: Backend Systems · AI/ML Engineer · RAG Systems

bio: Software Engineer with experience in backend systems and AI/ML applications, specializing in building REST APIs, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) systems, and scalable services using Python, FastAPI, Docker, and PostgreSQL. Strong foundation in Data Structures & Algorithms, DBMS, Operating Systems, Computer Networks, and System Design, with hands-on experience across LangChain, LangGraph, vector search, and multimodal machine learning.

bullets: Developed a production-ready Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) chatbot for course-based knowledge retrieval using LangChain, FastAPI, and PostgreSQL (pgvector), enabling context-aware question answering.
Designed LangChain agent workflows for query routing, context retrieval, and answer validation, improving response quality across AI-powered learning workflows.
Built scalable FastAPI backend services with asynchronous processing, semantic search, and caching, improving end-to-end response latency by ~40%.

Containerized backend services using Docker Compose and integrated PostgreSQL with Prometheus monitoring, implementing persistent conversational memory using PostgreSQL (JSONB) for personalized responses across multiple user sessions.
experience.desc: Built a production-ready RAG chatbot with LangChain and FastAPI, improving response latency ~40% and enabling context-aware, memory-persistent conversations.

bullets: Developed a multimodal emotion-recognition system (text + speech), achieving 86.8% text and 81.2% speech classification accuracy.
Preprocessed and trained ensemble deep learning models on 18K text and 6K speech samples.
Engineered an inference pipeline and deployed the model for real-time emotion classification across multimodal inputs.
experience.desc: Built a multimodal emotion-recognition system across text and speech, training ensemble deep learning models on 24K+ samples with real-time inference.

bullets: Developed a content-based recommendation engine for global exporters using TF-IDF vectorization and cosine similarity to identify relevant international trade opportunities.
Developed an automated data collection pipeline extracting 3K+ records using Selenium and BeautifulSoup.
Presented the recommendation system at the Global TradeTech Forum (World Economic Forum).
experience.desc: Built a recommendation engine for global trade opportunities and presented the system at the Global TradeTech Forum, World Economic Forum.

projects.title: MemoryForge
projects.subtitle: Agentic Conversational RAG Backend
projects.desc: A modular conversational RAG system orchestrated with LangGraph, combining BM25 and vector similarity search with Redis-backed memory across 100+ sessions. Integrated LLMLingua for 4–6× token compression with real-time streaming responses, deployed via Docker Compose with full observability.

projects.title: Agentic Loan Recovery System
projects.subtitle: Explainable AI for Risk Scoring
projects.desc: A modular ML pipeline (Random Forest + SMOTE) trained on 10K loan records, achieving 85% recovery prediction accuracy. Exposed via FastAPI for real-time risk scoring, with SHAP-based explainability and a Streamlit dashboard visualizing risk metrics.
